title: Pocket-Gull: Real-time Medical Care Plan Strategy and Live AI Consult Engine
description: Pocket-Gull is a real-time medical Care Plan Strategy and Live AI Consult engine powered by Google Gemini. It provides actionable clinical intelligence, manages patient state across Western, Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM), and Ayurvedic paradigms, and offers real-time streaming AI consultations for symptom management.
